name: Winter's Crest in Whitestone
description:
Welcome to the wonderful world of Exandria... but in the holidays~

That is right! Come one and come all to the city of Whitestone, where they'll be having their biggest Winter's Crest celebration yet! It's a time for goodness and giving– for friends and family to all come together and be grateful for another year of freedom, all while cozied up under a soft snowfall.

But there is a tale to be told on this holiday, isn't there? That's why you're here, is it not. To see, to tell, what tale is to come to this city, and to those that live within it. I suppose that'll be up to you to decide, for during Winter's Crest, the only limitation is your imagination... unless a little magic is involved.

❄️✨🎁🎄🎁✨❄️

Authors Note: Yes, I know. Another technical Vox Machina bot, but to be fair what did you expect from me? But seeing how it's the holiday season, why not get creative with Tal'dorei's very own Winter's Crest? But yes, this is written for the Vox Machina era in specific, but with how open ended I've made the bot, you could probably include any character you want (though I am not sure how well that'll work).

Anyway, as you can see this bot's intro is open ended, so you can chose how the tale starts, as long as it remains in the holiday spirit! So go on, and happy holidays to you all!!!

Artwork is official art from Critical Role by Kent Davis.
creator: Rosalieann
